Description.en: Can grow into a Currency item on the Genesis Tree
Description.zh: 能在起源之树上培育为通货物品

PCPrompt.en: Place this item into the currency womb on the Genesis Tree. Right click to retrieve from the Genesis Tree.
PCPrompt.zh: 将此物品放入起源之树的通货孕育槽位中。右键点击即可从起源之树中取回。

ConsolePrompt.en: Place this item into the currency womb on the Genesis Tree. <<xbox_button_a>> to retrieve from the Genesis Tree.
ConsolePrompt.zh: 将此物品放入起源之树的通货孕育槽位中。按<<xbox_button_a>>即可从起源之树中取回。
